title: Process Engineer Vacancy at EPC Industrie - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at EPC Industrie - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? EPC Industrie in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About EPC Industrie:
EPC Industrie is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie!
